case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE CHANDELARIO HOIL ABAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED OCT-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ABAN, JOSE CHANDELARIO HOIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABAN, JOSE CHANDELARIO HOIL $1,521.15 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,626.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,521.15 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ABAN, JOSE CHANDELARIO HOIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC., REPRESENTED BG JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
